prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年理科/物理类最低位次约4955→8432→9631→8378→12141，整体呈显著后移趋势，近3年累计后移约3763名；2025年基准约12141名；该校在云南理科/物理类招生计划2021年46人、2022年46人、2023年44人、2024年45人、2025年50人；2026年计划57人，较2025年增加7人，扩招约14%，竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名从2021年第65名稳步上升至2026年第57名，学校综合实力持续提升；2025年高考周期内声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及师德师风事件；抖音热度总排名第73、评价"一般"，短视频平台曝光度中等；未见明显投档断档记录；法学A（五院四系之一），应用经济学A-；统计学类、计算机类等理工专业虽未单独评级，但依托学校财经政法优势，就业方向明确。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类社会热度偏热但呈降温趋势，电子信息/通信高热推荐，电气工程高热推荐；本省2026年高考总人数约37.79万，较2025年约28.57万大幅增加约32%，物理类考生预计从约17.3万增至约22.9万，竞争显著加剧；学校位于湖北武汉，属中部地区，对西南省份考生有一定吸引力但非首选地域。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年招生计划扩招约14%、本省物理类考生大幅增加约32%、学校软科排名持续上升但声誉偏负面等因素，扩招效应与考生增加效应部分抵消，在2025年基准12141名基础上预计竞争仍略有加剧；预测最低位次约13202名，区间12702-13702名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 4955 → 8432 → 9631 → 8378 → 12141, showing a significant overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3763 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 12141; the university's enrollment plan in Yunnan for science/physics category was 46 in 2021, 46 in 2022, 44 in 2023, 45 in 2024, and 50 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 57, an increase of 7 from 2025, an expansion of about 14%, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking has steadily risen from 65th in 2021 to 57th in 2026, with continuously improving comprehensive strength; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents; its overall ranking on Douyin popularity is 73rd, with a rating of 'average', indicating moderate exposure on short video platforms; no obvious records of admission cut-off gaps; Law is rated A (one of the Five Academies and Four Schools), Applied Economics is rated A-; disciplines like Statistics and Computer Science, though not individually rated, rely on the university's advantages in economics, finance, and law, with clear employment directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science majors are socially hot but showing a cooling trend; electronics/information and communication are highly recommended, electrical engineering is highly recommended; the total number of candidates in the province for the 2026 college entrance examination is about 377,900, a significant increase of about 32% from about 285,700 in 2025, with physics category candidates expected to increase from about 173,000 to about 229,000, significantly intensifying competition; the university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region, which has some appeal to candidates from southwestern provinces but is not a preferred region.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2026 enrollment plan expansion of about 14%, a significant increase of about 32% in local physics category candidates, the university's rising Soft Science ranking but somewhat negative reputation, the expansion effect and the candidate increase effect partially offset each other; based on the 2025 baseline of 12141, competition is still expected to slightly intensify; the predicted minimum ranking is about 13202, with a range of 12702-13702.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 12702-13702, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 popular majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 12702), you can focus on challenging popular majors like Statistics, Computer Science, and Law; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 13702), you should mainly consider Tier 3 majors and be cautious with Tier 1 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 2454 → 1396 → 1756 → 1944 → 2020, showing a fluctuating trend of first decreasing then increasing, with a cumulative backward shift of about 624 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 2020 places; the university's enrollment plan in Yunnan for liberal arts/history category was 48 in 2021, 48 in 2022, 50 in 2023, 51 in 2024, and 50 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 44, a decrease of 6 from 2025, a reduction of about 12%, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science main ranking steadily rose from 65th in 2021 to 57th in 2026, with continuously improving comprehensive strength, enhancing attractiveness to candidates; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents (professor assessment controversy); Douyin popularity total ranking 73rd, evaluation 'average', moderate exposure on short video platforms; no obvious record of enrollment gaps; Law A (one of the Five Institutes and Four Departments), Applied Economics A-; Law is the university's flagship major with high social recognition, strongly attracting liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major is generally popular but showing divergence, finance/economics majors are diverging and wait-and-see; the province's total number of candidates for the 2026 college entrance examination is about 377,900, a significant increase of about 32% from about 285,700 in 2025, with history category candidates expected to increase from about 112,000 to about 149,000, significantly intensifying competition; the university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region, which has some appeal to candidates from southwestern provinces but is not the preferred region.

预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2026 enrollment plan reduction of about 12%, a significant increase of about 32% in the province's history category candidates, a somewhat negative reputation but continuously rising Soft Science ranking, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 2020 places; predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1905, with a range of 1562-2248.
